parameters.content: Connector template for Mermaid::build_mermaid_artifact. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"mermaid","display_name":"Mermaid","operation_id":"build_mermaid_artifact","method":"LOCAL","base_url":"{$env.MERMAID_RENDER_BASE_URL}","path":"mermaid://artifact","url":"{$env.MERMAID_RENDER_BASE_URL}mermaid://artifact","headers":{},"body":{},"query":{},"integration_mode":"artifact","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["MERMAID_RENDER_BASE_URL"],"notes":"Stores Mermaid source strings and emits render-ready artifacts."}}];
return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
